oh god a second varka bot… do you know what that means

it’s over for me

ngl, out of all my varka bots, this one is my personal favorite. it's less horny on main, can be fluffy or angsty but open to interpretation. also includes my first LONG ass greeting beyond 300 tokens (around 800)! that’s how you know this man has ruined me 🤠

2/28 update: added a 2nd greeting and updated art. updated description to make varka more lore accurate.


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────


⤷ new greeting! includes 2 greetings (anypov):

⚔️ it’s not homecoming without coming home to you.
⚔️ varka finds you at the anemo archon statue!

> Additional Tags: Reunions, (Potential) Angst, Comfort, Sneaking Out, Humor
